column1: # Writer features not yet implemented for a target. One `target<TAB>feature` pair per line;
# blank lines and lines beginning with `#` are ignored. The feature is the `corpus/ast/`
# subdirectory name. Both the Rust golden-writer test and the shell conformance suite read this
# file and skip the listed pairs, reporting the skip count. Delete a line when its writer path
# lands, and the corpus case activates automatically.
